faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about our services, programs, and facilities
faq.noResults: No questions found matching your search.
faq.question1: What is the Technology Transfer Office (TTO)?
faq.answer1: The Technology Transfer Office (TTO) is responsible for managing and commercializing intellectual property and research results from the institution.
faq.question2: How can I protect my intellectual property?
faq.answer2: You can protect your intellectual property through patents, trademarks, copyrights, and trade secrets. Our TTO team can guide you through the process and help you choose the best protection strategy for your innovation.
faq.question3: What services does the Industrial Department offer?
faq.answer3: The Industrial Department provides technical support, research and development services, and industrial solutions to help businesses innovate and grow.
faq.question4: How can I join the incubator program?
faq.answer4: To join our incubator program, you need to submit an application with your business idea or project. Our team will evaluate your proposal and guide you through the selection process.
faq.question5: What resources are available at the Technology Center?
faq.answer5: The Technology Center offers state-of-the-art equipment, technical expertise, and collaborative spaces for research, development, and innovation projects.
